title: tolpis fruticosa
intro: Tolpis fruticosa, also known as the woolly cudweed or cottonweed, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tolpis fruticosa include its ability to aid in the reduction of swelling and inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues. Tolpis fruticosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
